use_cases: Primary call-to-action buttons in landing pages and feature sections
Form submission and interactive controls in web applications
Navigation triggers and action triggers in dashboards and interfaces
Multi-variant button system for different importance levels (primary, secondary, destructive)
Accessible button component with keyboard navigation support
ai_summary: A reusable button component built with Radix UI Slot and class-variance-authority that provides multiple visual variants (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) and size options (default, sm, lg, icon). Features standard accessibility attributes including focus-visible ring states and disabled states. Designed as an atomic UI primitive for building consistent button interfaces across applications.
